title: veronica teucrium subsp. prostrata
intro: Veronica teucrium subsp. prostrata, also known as prostrate broomrape, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. Veronica teucrium subsp. prostrata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
